pages.notes: Index page mapping diary page numbers to places visited, covering trips from 2003 to 2005 (with PTO suggesting continuation). Year headings '2003', '2004', '2005' are underlined. Entry 6: second place after Hermeskeil is partly illegible — could be 'Leo Sensor' or similar, followed by Ypres. Entry 7: 'Nether Wotote' could read 'Nether Wootton' or 'Nether Wotton'. Entry 10: 'Chestars' likely 'Chesters' (Roman fort). Entry 11: 'Heatton' likely 'Heaton'. Entry 15: 'Beborough' uncertain — could be 'Bewdborough' or 'Beborough'. Entry 20: second place after Guernica is crossed out/overwritten, could be 'Markina'. Entry 30: first word crossed out, replaced with 'Melageon'; 'Arc-les-Thermes' could be 'Ax-les-Thermes'. Entry 32: 'Les Sauterelles' uncertain, could be 'Cauterets' or a campsite name. Entry 35: place after 'Cuca Abbey' unclear, could be 'Elne' or 'Elu'. Entry 36: 'Treve' and 'Carcasson' likely Trèves and Carcassonne. Entry 37: 'Realment' likely Réalmont. Entry 40: 'Eymentiers' likely Eymoutiers. Entry 43: 'Lodques' uncertain — possibly Loctques or a campsite; 'Point du Hoc' likely Pointe du Hoc. Entry 46: 'Trumpley' likely Trimpley. Entry 52: second word after Malvern could be 'Bromyard' (faint). Annotation at bottom 'Guggenheim Museum Bilbao 1997 by Frank O'Gehry' is a note about the photo on the facing page.

Full-page photograph (postcard or printed photo) of an aerial/overhead view of a building — consistent with the Guggenheim Museum Bilbao as noted on the facing left page. No handwritten text on this page.
